# /blueprint

> Domain-scoped blueprint capturing system-context + per-pattern sequence diagrams + dataflow diagrams + IaC topology. Mermaid-only (no PNG/JPG).

## Usage

```
/blueprint [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/plan.md` (`PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/integration/{fdd,tdd}.md`
- [templates/blueprint.template.md](../../templates/blueprint.template.md)
- [constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md](../../constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/integration/blueprint.md`.
2. For the current feature:
   - **System context** — actors + external systems + the integration domain
   - **Per-pattern sequence diagrams** (one per FR; show retry / DLQ / claim-check legs)
   - **ADF dataflow diagrams** — source → staging → conformed
   - **IaC topology** — Bicep module hierarchy + resource group + VNet layout
   - **Security topology** — Managed Identity, Key Vault, private endpoints, NSGs
3. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md).
4. Run `doc_lint` (Mermaid-only enforced).
5. `currentStates += BLUEPRINT_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/blueprint.md`

## See also

- [templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md)
- [constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md](../../constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md)
